_comment: Small committed fixture with a real .idx.fpi spanning many fence groups (1500 headwords / 8 sectors-per-group). Used by DictEngineTest to exercise the .fpi bracket binary search in Dictionary::findSimilar for target words far past offset 0. Tiny definitions keep the generated dict well under ~30 KB.

meta.name: fuzzy-fpi
meta.author: CrossPoint Test Suite
meta.description: Multi-page synthetic dictionary for fuzzy-search .fpi bracket binary-search tests.
